name: python3-deprecation
title: python3-deprecation
description:
Library to handle automated deprecations
Deprecation is a library that enables automated deprecations.
.
It offers the deprecated() decorator to wrap functions, providing proper
warnings both in documentation and via Python’s warnings system, as well as
the deprecation.fail_if_not_removed() decorator for test methods to ensure
that deprecated code is eventually removed.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-deprecation because Library to handle automated deprecations.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-deprecation as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-deprecation with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-deprecation --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
